content.fact_text: Implemented InventoryEventDispatcher with production-grade reliability, security, and idempotency features for the inventory event-driven backend.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides robust, idempotent inventory event publication to Kafka, utilizing circuit breakers, HMAC-SHA256 request signing, and structured logging. Supports graceful shutdown and schema validation via Zod.
interfaces: async publish(topic: string, event: InventoryEvent): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a reliable, production-ready event dispatcher for inventory updates, ensuring data integrity via HMAC signing and high availability via idempotent Kafka producers and circuit breakers.
